title: Shapes Resources
description: By day, a search for resources and survival, and by night, a struggle between sanity and madness. Shapes Resources is a supplementary resource pack for a psychological horror and RPG modpack.
body:
Shapes Resources is a resource pack for a modpack that's a survival RPG mixed with psychological horror, containing some creatures that are definitely not human.

Things like the title, splashes, background, some blocks, items, and GUI have been changed for greater immersion in the modpack.
